title: IT technicians
description: Analyze and coordinate the schedule, timeline, procurement, staffing, and budget of a product or service on a per project basis. Lead and guide the work of technical staff. May serve as a point of contact for the client or customer. Plan, implement, upgrade, or monitor security measures for the protection of computer networks and information. Assess system vulnerabilities for security risks and propose and implement risk mitigation strategies. May ensure appropriate security controls are in place that will safeguard digital files and vital electronic infrastructure. May respond to computer security breaches and viruses. Analyze, test, troubleshoot, and evaluate existing network systems, such as local area networks (LAN), wide area networks (WAN), cloud networks, servers, and other data communications networks. Perform network maintenance to ensure networks operate correctly with minimal interruption. (Based on 20 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Back up network data and perform data backups and disaster recovery operations.
Configure security settings or access permissions for groups or individuals, and implement and provide technical support for security measures such as firewalls and antivirus software.
Train users in procedures related to network applications software or related systems and promote security awareness to ensure system security and improve network efficiency.
Analyze network data to determine usage, and evaluate local area network (LAN) or wide area network (WAN) performance to ensure availability, speed, and identify problems.
Monitor industry websites or publications for information about patches, releases, viruses, or potential problems and monitor the performance of network systems for necessary adjustments.
Document network support activities and maintain logs related to network functions, including activity, maintenance, and repair records.
Analyze reported network security breaches or attempted breaches and develop plans to safeguard computer files against unauthorized access or modification.
Troubleshoot network or connectivity problems for users, identify the causes of networking problems, and diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve hardware, software, and other system issues.

Install and configure new hardware or software systems or components, ensuring integration with existing network systems, and perform routine maintenance or standard repairs to networking components or equipment.
Create or update technical documentation for network installations, changes to existing installations, or user instructions, procedures, or manuals.
Research hardware or software products to meet networking or security needs and evaluate or recommend server hardware or software to improve system performance.
Collaborate with management or users to develop strategies for improving e-commerce or network services and facilitate purchases by coordinating with vendors and company personnel.

Gather data pertaining to customer needs to identify, predict, interpret, and evaluate system and network requirements, and conduct risk assessments to ensure functioning of data processing activities and security measures.

Monitor the use of data files and regulate access to safeguard information in computer files, and keep abreast of developments in network security measures or technologies through ongoing education and professional participation.
Evaluate or recommend technologies for integration within existing systems and establish optimum values for database parameters and configurations.
Review project requests describing database user needs to estimate time and cost required to accomplish the project.
Test programs or databases, correct errors, and make necessary modifications.
Train users, answer questions, and provide technical support to junior staff or clients.
Work as part of a project team to coordinate database development, determine project scope and limitations, and communicate with users to analyze, configure, or troubleshoot applications.
Write and code logical and physical database descriptions, and specify identifiers of database to management system or direct others in coding descriptions.
Develop data models describing data elements and their use, following procedures, and using pen, template, or computer software.
Document, design, code, or test Geographic Information Systems (GIS) models, internet mapping solutions, or other applications.
Confer with management or development teams to prioritize needs, resolve conflicts, develop content criteria, or choose solutions.
Identify security system weaknesses using penetration tests, and develop or implement software tools to assist in the detection, prevention, and analysis of security threats.
Document changes or change procedures for applications and Web sites, and develop training materials for Geographic Information Systems (GIS) users.
Coordinate documentation of computer security or emergency measure policies, procedures, or tests, and assess the quality of security controls using performance indicators.
Test the security and performance of systems regularly, including new software packages for Web operations or applications.
Perform user testing or usage analyses to determine the effectiveness or usability of Web sites.
Document installation or configuration procedures to allow maintenance and repetition, and perform system analysis, data analysis, or programming using various computer languages and procedures.
Prepare functional or technical documentation for data warehouses and develop or document database architectures.
Develop testing routines and procedures, and evaluate testing routines or procedures for adequacy, sufficiency, and effectiveness.
Prepare detailed reports regarding security breaches or network evaluations and investigations, as well as correcting testing-identified problems.
Identify and correct deviations from database development standards, and map data between source systems, data warehouses, and data marts.
Evaluate recommendations for server hardware or software and analyze log files to verify proper system performance.

Recommend information security enhancements to management, oversee the performance of risk assessment, or execution of system tests to ensure the functioning of data processing activities or security measures.
Analyze and troubleshoot security and network problems, while coordinating monitoring of networks or systems for security breaches or intrusions.
Provide training or technical assistance in Web site implementation or use, and develop or implement procedures for ongoing Web site revision.
Test software systems or applications for software enhancements or new products and evaluate or recommend server hardware or software.

Develop and implement database architectural strategies, standards, and security measures to meet business requirements, including defining and analyzing system objectives, designing applications, and ensuring performance, security, and reliability.
